milestones: Queried pg_stat_statements to analyze query execution statistics (calls, total_time, rows) for identifying slow or heavy queries
Queried pg_locks or pg_stat_activity to investigate lock contention between concurrent transactions
Queried pg_stat_user_indexes and/or pg_indexes to examine index definitions and usage patterns for detecting redundant or unused indexes
Queried pg_stat_user_tables or pg_stat_all_tables to check dead tuple counts and vacuum-related statistics
Exactly three root causes are selected from the allowed list of five options (INSERT_LARGE_DATA, LOCK_CONTENTION, VACUUM, REDUNDANT_INDEX, FETCH_LARGE_DATA)
Multiple agents were assigned to independently analyze different potential root causes before a final combined decision was made
